name: Addressable Light
description: The `addressable_light` display platform allows to display text and graphics on an addressable light that has been arranged in a display matrix.

config_entries.label: Update Interval
config_entries.description: The interval to call the lambda to update the display. Defaults to `16ms`.

config_entries.label: Addressable Light ID
config_entries.description: The id of the addressable light component to use as a display.

config_entries.label: Height
config_entries.description: The height of the LED matrix in pixels.

config_entries.label: Lambda
config_entries.description:
**Set at most one of:** `pages`, `lambda`.

The lambda to use for rendering the content on the display. `it` will be an instance of <APIClass text="DisplayBuffer" path="display::DisplayBuffer" />. See [Display Rendering Engine](https://esphome.io/components/display#display-engine) for more information.

config_entries.label: Pages
config_entries.description:
**Set at most one of:** `pages`, `lambda`.

Show pages instead of a single lambda. See [Display Pages](https://esphome.io/components/display#display-pages).

config_entries.label: Width
config_entries.description: The width of the LED matrix in pixels.

config_entries.label: ID
config_entries.description: Manually specify the ID used for code generation.

config_entries.label: Auto Clear Enabled
config_entries.description: Whether to automatically clear the display data before each lambda call, or to keep the existing display content (must overwrite explicitly, e.g., only on data change). Defaults to `true` if a lambda or pages are configured, false otherwise.

config_entries.label: Pixel Mapper
config_entries.description: A lambda that returns the integer address of the LED given the supplied the `x` and `y` pixel coordinate. By default, a left-to-right direct pixel mapper is used.

config_entries.label: Rotation
config_entries.description: Set the rotation of the display. Everything you draw in `lambda:` will be rotated by this option. One of `0°` (default), `90°`, `180°`, `270°`.
